cover_optimization.note: generate_data.py outputs WebP directly, optimize_covers.py is for legacy re-optimization

github_releases.note: Smart Incremental Sync: only uploads NEW books, uses data.json as single source of truth

dependencies.install_cmd: python -m pip install PyMuPDF Pillow python-docx
dependencies.note: MUST use 'python -m pip install' (not 'pip install') to ensure packages are installed for the correct Python interpreter. System may have multiple Python versions.
